<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="wUfQmTgySQfJjvCFJ-2V"> <mxGraphModel dx="2542" dy="1629" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TB

%% ==========================================================
%% USERS
%% ==========================================================

subgraph USERS[\"Users\"]
 SA([Super Admin / Admin])
 TPO([TPO Officer])
 COORD([Coordinator])
 HOD([HOD / Dean])
end

%% ==========================================================
%% API LAYER (MOUNTED)
%% ==========================================================

subgraph MOUNTED[\"REST API — Mounted in server.js\"]
 AUTH[Auth Module<br/>/auth<br/>7 endpoints]
 C360[Company360 Module<br/>/api/company360<br/>8 endpoints]
 ANALYTICS[Analytics Module<br/>/analytics<br/>1 endpoint]
end

subgraph MIDDLEWARE[\"Middleware\"]
 JWT[JWT Authentication]
 ADMIN[Admin Role Gate]
end

SA -->|Login| AUTH
TPO -->|Login| AUTH
COORD -->|Login| AUTH
HOD -->|Login| AUTH

AUTH --> JWT
C360 --> JWT
ANALYTICS --> JWT

JWT --> ADMIN

%% ==========================================================
%% CONTROLLERS NOT YET MOUNTED
%% ==========================================================

subgraph UNMOUNTED[\"Controllers Available (not yet wired)\"]
 ALUMNI_CTRL[Alumni Controller<br/>18 endpoints]
 MOU_CTRL[MoU Controller<br/>11 endpoints]
 DEAL_CTRL[DealPipeline Controller]
 OUTREACH_CTRL[Outreach Controller]
 EMP_CTRL[Employment Controller]
end

%% ==========================================================
%% SERVICE LAYER
%% ==========================================================

subgraph SERVICES[\"Service Layer (all built)\"]
 C360SVC[Company360Service]
 ALUMNI_SVC[AlumniService]
 DEAL_SVC[DealPipelineService]
 MOU_SVC[MoUService]
 OUTREACH_SVC[OutreachService]
 EMP_SVC[EmploymentService]
 ANALYTICS_SVC[AnalyticsService]
end

C360 --> C360SVC
ANALYTICS --> ANALYTICS_SVC
ALUMNI_CTRL --> ALUMNI_SVC
MOU_CTRL --> MOU_SVC
DEAL_CTRL --> DEAL_SVC
OUTREACH_CTRL --> OUTREACH_SVC
EMP_CTRL --> EMP_SVC

%% ==========================================================
%% DATABASE
%% ==========================================================

subgraph DATABASE[\"Persistent Storage\"]
 PG[(PostgreSQL<br/>Supabase)]
 PRISMA[Prisma ORM<br/>7 models]
end

C360SVC --> PRISMA
ALUMNI_SVC --> PRISMA
DEAL_SVC --> PRISMA
MOU_SVC --> PRISMA
OUTREACH_SVC --> PRISMA
EMP_SVC --> PRISMA
ANALYTICS_SVC --> PRISMA

PRISMA --> PG

%% ==========================================================
%% EXTERNAL SERVICES
%% ==========================================================

SMTP[(SMTP Email Gateway<br/>Nodemailer)]

AUTH -->|Send OTP| SMTP

%% ==========================================================
%% DEFERRED TO V2
%% ==========================================================

subgraph DEFERRED[\"Deferred to V2\"]
 UI[React PWA / Next.js Frontend]
 MATCH[Rule-Based Matching Engine]
 HEALTH[Health Score Calculation]
 BULK[Async Bulk Email Queue]
 JOB[Job → Application → Offer Pipeline]
 PORT[Live Portfolio Showcase]
 FEEDBACK[Recruiter Feedback Module]
end

UI -.->|Not built| AUTH
UI -.->|Not built| C360
UI -.->|Not built| ANALYTICS

 "data": "flowchart LR

 subgraph AUTH_FLOW[\"JWT Authentication Flow\"]
 REQ[\"Request\n+ Bearer Token\"] --> VERIFY[\"jwt.verify\ntoken + JWT_SECRET\"]
 VERIFY --> DECODE[\"Decode Payload\n{id, email, role, exp}\"]
 DECODE --> ATTACH[\"Attach req.user\n{id, email, role}\"]
 ATTACH --> ROLE_GATE[\"isAdmin middleware\n(optional, checks role)\"]
 ROLE_GATE --> CONTROLLER[\"Controller\nExecutes\"]
 end

 subgraph COMPANY_FLOW[\"Company360 CRUD Flow\"]
 CREATE[\"POST /api/company360\"] --> VALIDATE[\"Validate + Normalize\n(pick writable fields)\"]
 VALIDATE --> DB_WRITE[\"Prisma Create\nPostgreSQL\"]
 DB_WRITE --> RESP[\"201 + company data\"]
 end

 subgraph AUTH_MODULE[\"Auth Module Flows\"]
 LOGIN[\"POST /auth/login\n{email, password}\"] --> FIND[\"prisma.user.findUnique\"]
 FIND --> BCRYPT[\"bcrypt.compare\"]
 BCRYPT -->|Valid| TOKEN[\"JWT.sign\n{id, email, role}\"]
 TOKEN --> LOGIN_RESP[\"200 + {token, user}\"]

 FORGOT[\"POST /auth/forgot-password\n{email}\"] --> OTP[\"Generate 6-digit OTP\"]
 OTP --> STORE[\"Save otp + otpExpiry to user\"]
 STORE --> SEND[\"nodemailer.sendMail\nSMTP → user email\"]
 SEND --> FORGOT_RESP[\"200 + confirmation message\"]
 end

 subgraph DEFERRED[\"Deferred to V2\"]
 BULK[\"Async Bulk Email Queue\n(BullMQ + Redis + Nodemailer Pool)\"]
 MATCH[\"Matching Sieve Engine\n(rule-based skills scoring)\"]
 HEALTH[\"Health Score Calculation\n(engagement + placement + MoU)\"]
 end
",
 "config": null
